seoTitle: Westmead vs Weston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Westmead and Weston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Westmead and Weston.
heading: Westmead vs Weston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Westmead, New South Wales and Weston, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Weston has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Westmead (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Westmead or Weston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Westmead has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Weston scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Westmead scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Weston scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Westmead or Weston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Weston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
